---
title: "Djovan Velasco"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/djovan-velasco/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Djovan-Velasco
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:djovan@icloud.com"
    - text: Resume
      href: "DV_resume_web.pdf"
toc: false
---

Aspiring data scientist with a B.S. in Statistics and Data Science from UCLA. Experienced in computational statistics, regression modeling, and predictive analytics using R and Python. Deeply interested in data engineering and analytics, with a drive to transform complex datasets into actionable insights and measurable impact. Passionate about sports and applying data as a tool to foster player growth.

## Education

University of California, Los Angeles \| B.S in Statistics and Data Science

University of Southern California \| Pursuing M.S. in Applied Data Science
